pi_items.source: Verifier checks this exact path for the created experiment.
Verifier checks this exact path for the conditions CSV.
setup_task.sh generates synthetic abstract shapes in this directory.
Verifier explicitly checks if the number of rows in the conditions CSV is >= 10.
Verifier enforces a left/right balance ratio between 0.4 and 0.6, corresponding to a difference of proportions bounded by 0.2.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated abstract shape stimuli stored in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli. The goal is to build a Delayed Match-to-Sample (DMS) experiment and save it to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/dms_task.psyexp with a conditions CSV file located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/dms_conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain at least 10 trials, and the correct spatial positioning (left vs right) must be balanced between 40% and 60% (corresponding to a balance_tolerance of 0.2).
